chooseResponse.q: What time is the meeting tomorrow?

conversation.transcript:
Student: Hey, have you heard about the new art exhibit opening on campus?
Advisor: Yes, I read about it in the newsletter. Are you planning to attend?
Student: Definitely! I love contemporary art.
Advisor: That sounds great. I hear there will be some workshops too.

questions.q: What does the student enjoy about the exhibit?
What did the advisor read about?
questions.explain: 顧問讀到的是藝術展覽的資訊。

announcement.transcript: Attention all students! The library will be hosting a special event this Friday at 3 PM featuring local authors. Come join us for readings, discussions, and a chance to meet the authors. Refreshments will be provided. We hope to see you there!

questions.explain: 這個活動是關於當地作家的。

questions.q: What will be provided at the event?
questions.explain: 活動中會提供小吃和飲料。

talk.transcript: Today, I'll be discussing the importance of biodiversity. Biodiversity refers to the variety of life found on Earth, including the different species of plants, animals, and microorganisms. It is crucial for ecosystem stability and resilience. A diverse ecosystem can better withstand environmental changes and provides essential services, like pollination and clean air. Unfortunately, human activities are threatening biodiversity through habitat destruction, pollution, and climate change. Protecting biodiversity is vital for maintaining the health of our planet and ensuring a sustainable future for all living beings.

questions.explain: 生物多樣性是地球上生命的多樣性，包括不同物種。
生物多樣性對生態系統的穩定性至關重要。
人類活動威脅到生物多樣性。

questions.q: What can be a consequence of lower biodiversity?
questions.explain: 生物多樣性降低可能導致生態系統的韌性減少。
